global_description: A small, slender woodpecker with a black and white barred back and a distinctive red cap. The bird has a white cheek patch and a black crown. Its wings are black with white spots, and it has a white belly. The tail is black with white outer feathers.

part_details.head: Black crown with a red cap and white cheek patch

spatial_relations: The red cap is on top of the black crown
The white cheek patch is below the black crown
The barred back extends from the neck to the tail
The wings are attached to the sides of the body
The tail extends from the back end of the body
